items.title: Welcome
items.body:
this is a small place for things i find beautiful, interesting, or worth keeping.

there's no real theme. no careful curation. just a collection of moments that made me stop and look a little longer.

items.title: Stealing non-Perfectionism
items.caption: Stealing quotes and designs, one image at a time.

items.title: Textures
items.caption: As I explored finding my style in Digital collage-ing. I found that the patterns I found, needed a good texture to fit in to the visions I had.

items.title: Selective seeing
items.caption: I wanted some ways to make things fun. this was a recreation of some other piece.

items.title: Something I like a lot is coming up
overlays
items.caption: In the series of textures, this is the first time, I was able to play with the world I have known/seen - to build fun textures together by overlaying them all

items.title: Picking Textile Dreams w/ Mamma
items.caption: Colors, textiles, and memories with Mamma

items.title: Thank you!
items.body:
Let me know what you think, or if you want to know more how I created them. 

I used Affinity in my mac to make these. More than anything, they were generally quite fun to make.
